---
title: ""
pagetitle: "About — Voyara"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.full-bleed .hero style="padding:7rem 1.5rem 4rem;"}
::: {.hero-inner}
[About Voyara]{.eyebrow}

# Travel people, [at your service]{}

::: {.lead}
We started Voyara because booking a trip — or moving abroad to study — shouldn't mean dealing with five different agents and a pile of paperwork.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.lead-center}
Voyara brings tour planning, visas, ticketing, and study-abroad guidance under one roof. One advisor, one plan, one point of contact — from your first idea to your safe return.

Over the past decade our team has helped thousands of travelers and students reach destinations across more than forty countries, with a near-perfect visa success rate and support that never sleeps.
:::
:::

::: {.section style="padding-top:0;"}
::: {.section-head}
[What we stand for]{.eyebrow}

## How we work
:::

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🧭
:::
### Honest advice
We recommend what's right for you — not whatever earns the biggest commission.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
🔍
:::
### Transparent pricing
Clear, itemized proposals. No surprise fees buried in the fine print.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
⏱️
:::
### Always reachable
A real person, available 24/7, in any time zone you happen to be in.
:::
::: {.v-card}
::: {.icon}
❤️
:::
### Genuinely passionate
We travel ourselves. The recommendations come from real experience.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.full-bleed .band}
::: {.band-inner}
::: {.stat}
[12+]{.num}
[Years of experience]{.lbl}
:::
::: {.stat}
[40+]{.num}
[Countries covered]{.lbl}
:::
::: {.stat}
[9k+]{.num}
[Happy travelers]{.lbl}
:::
::: {.stat}
[98%]{.num}
[Visa success rate]{.lbl}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.cta-banner}
## Let's plan something great
We'd love to hear where you want to go next.

[Get in touch](contact.qmd){.btn-voyara .btn-voyara-primary}
:::

<script src="assets/js/reveal.js"></script>
